name: Orc Bounty
description: An orc marauder has been stalking the dark forest road, preying on travelers. Bring it down.
accept_text: Hendricks slides a marked bounty sheet across the table. 'Orc marauder — big one, scarred from old battles. It's been hunting the dark forest road. Merchants won't use the route until it's dead. Kill it and I'll pay forty gold.'
complete_text: The orc marauder is dead. The dark forest road is open again.
